title: eragrostis rejuvenescens
intro: Eragrostis rejuvenescens, also known as Stipoid Desertgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to Australia, where it is commonly found in arid and semi-arid regions. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Eragrostis rejuvenescens can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and has been reported to have potential health benefits such as reducing stress and improving sleep quality, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
